provider.name: Cyfrowy Polsat
provider.servicehacks:
incorrectly_have_fta_flag = [ "13 Ulica HD", "AXN HD", "BBC Brit HD", "BBC Cbeebies", "BBC Lifestyle HD", "CI Polsat HD", "Disney Channel HD", "Dla Abonentow", "FX HD", "Fx Comedy HD", "History HD", "Jedynka - PR", "National Geographic Wild HD", "Nicktoons HD", "Polsat 2 HD", "Polsat Cafe HD", "Polsat Doku HD", "Polsat Film HD", "Polsat Games HD", "Polsat HD", "Polsat Music HD", "Polsat News 2 HD", "Polsat News HD", "Polsat Play HD ", "Polsat Play HD", "Polsat Sport 1", "SciFi HD", "TV4 HD ", "TVN 7 HD", "TVN HD", "TVP 2 HD", "Trójka - PR", ]
dxNoSDT = 0x1 # details of lamedb flags are in README.txt dxHoldName = 0x8 # details of lamedb flags are in README.txt
service["service_flags"] = dxNoSDT | dxHoldName
if service["service_type"] == 1 and service["service_name"][-2:] == 'HD': service["service_type"] = 25
#Force encrypted flag for channels that incorrectly have an FTA flag if service["service_name"] in incorrectly_have_fta_flag: service["free_ca"] = 1
